block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: Netflix experienced a loss of 1.5M subscribers during the first half of 2022 and was forced to downsize, resulting in over 300 job cuts in June. Although the streaming service eliminated hundreds of positions in the previous year, it is now searching for a flight attendant for their private aircraft. The compensation for this role could exceed $350,000 per year.
block_07: ResMed's growth rate of 21% each year for five years exceeded the earnings growth of the company over the same timeframe. This week, the stock price rose by nearly 8%. It appears that it is time to look again at healthcare stocks
block_10: In contrast to healthcare, some industrial sector stocks are declining. Following the announcement of a possible $7.6B acquisition of National Instruments, the company's share price is down by 11% this week.
